title: Tick Control in New Springville, Staten Island | $125 – $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in New Springville, Staten Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Affordable pricing $125 – $325. Call today!
intro: New Springville residents face increasing tick populations due to the neighborhood's proximity to wooded areas and parks like LaTourette Park and Clove Lakes Park. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services to protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatments create a safe barrier around your New Springville property, allowing you to enjoy your outdoor spaces worry-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in tick management throughout Staten Island, with extensive experience treating properties in New Springville's mix of suburban homes and garden-style developments. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are effective against all tick species while remaining safe for children, pets, and the environment.
localContext: New Springville's family-friendly neighborhoods, characterized by single-family homes with spacious yards near the Staten Island Mall and Richmond Avenue corridor, provide ideal habitats for deer ticks and dog ticks. The area's green spaces and residential landscaping require proactive tick management, especially during peak season from April through October.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in New Springville?
faqs.answer: New Springville's proximity to LaTourette Park, Clove Lakes Park, and other wooded areas creates ideal conditions for tick populations. Ticks carry serious diseases like Lyme disease, anaplasmosis, and Rocky Mountain spotted fever. Professional tick control protects your family and pets from these health risks while allowing you to safely enjoy your yard and nearby outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in New Springville?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in New Springville range from $125 to $325, depending on your property size, the severity of the tick problem, and treatment frequency. We offer both one-time treatments and seasonal programs that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season. We'll provide a detailed quote after assessing your specific property needs.

faqs.question: When is tick season in New Springville, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Tick season in New Springville typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active whenever temperatures are above freezing. We recommend starting preventive treatments in early spring before tick populations peak and continuing through fall for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are highly effective against ticks while being safe for families and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and until the treatment has dried, typically 1-2 hours. After that, your yard is safe to use and protected against ticks.
